displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 7
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Boba Fett – Bounty on Bar-Kooda (1995), Star Wars: Boba Fett (1997) #2 AKA Star Wars: Boba Fett – When the Fat Lady Swings, Star Wars: Boba Fett (1997) #3 AKA Star Wars: Boba Fett – Murder Most Foul, Star Wars: Boba Fett – Agent of Doom (2000) #1; Star Wars: Jedi Academy – Leviathan #1-4; Star Wars: The Mixed-Up Droid #1; Star Wars: Union #1-4; Star Wars: Chewbacca #1-4; material from Star Wars Tales #19
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 7
